steps.assistant_text: 2026-06-23 retraction was WRONG: the C reproduces the full 78-word block byte-for-byte including the 0x3F4 orphan mtc1 zero,f0 (IDO emits the 0.0f materialization BEFORE addiu sp — a pre-prologue insn). The INCLUDE_ASM block was already named game_uso_func_000003F8 starting at 0x3F4 (orphan-inclusive, size 0x134), so the promoted C occupies the identical address range — no shift; make verify ROM byte-identical confirms. Vec3 zero/fwd/up locals with pad sandwich for frame layout.
